ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Dialogo nobilissimo d`un cieco e d`un villano.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Composto dal Falotico della Congrega de` Rozzi
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Date and printer are suggested by the British Library catalogue
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
